asset.title: Research Enrichment
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: The workflow preview successfully demonstrates the research enrichment feature, showing the transition from pending items to completed research with updated trace logs and chat notifications.

featureClarity.evidence: The 'Enrich 4 pending' button and subsequent progress state clearly indicate the research enrichment feature.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the initial pending state, the active progress bar, and the final populated research cards.

visualDesign.evidence: The dark mode UI is structured, though the dense layout and small text elements reduce visual focus.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the NodeRoom paradigm of combining chat, research tabs, and trace logs.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Captured directly from the application interface, showing realistic data and state transitions.

legibility.evidence: Most text is readable, though the trace logs at the bottom are quite small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Demonstrates automated data enrichment, which is highly relevant for research and analyst workflows.

productionHonesty.evidence: The UI states and trace logs accurately reflect the background processing steps.

observedEvidence: Updated research cards with sources and descriptions
Agent notification in the public chat
Trace log updates reflecting lock releases and status changes

defects.observed: The trace log text at the bottom is very small and difficult to read at standard preview sizes.
defects.fix: Increase the font size of the trace log panel or zoom in slightly on the active panel during the transition.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom's agent enrich company profiles in real-time, updating the research workspace and logging every step in the trace.
